flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Oglethorpe University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($42.8k → $47.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Oglethorpe University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($42.8k → $47.6k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Oglethorpe University fell 11% between 2006 and 2009 (61.2% → 54.4%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Oglethorpe University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.1% → 0.0%).
